_comment: Clawd Theme Template — copy this folder to {userData}/themes/your-theme-id/ and customize
name: My Theme
author: Your Name
description: A short description of your theme

viewBox._comment: Logical canvas in SVG units. All assets should share this aspect ratio.

eyeTracking._comment: Set enabled:true if your idle SVG has #eyes-js / #body-js / #shadow-js groups for cursor tracking.

states._comment: Each state maps to an array of filenames in assets/. SVG, GIF, APNG, WebP all work. Only eyeTracking.states entries MUST be SVG.

_comment_optional_states: These states are optional. If omitted, Clawd falls back to idle/sleeping automatically.

workingTiers._comment: Show different animations based on concurrent session count

idleAnimations._comment: Random animations played during idle. duration in ms.

timings._comment: All values in milliseconds. Omit to use defaults.

hitBoxes._comment: Clickable area in viewBox units. 'default' is required.

reactions._comment: Click/drag reaction animations. All optional — omit the whole block to disable reactions.

sounds._comment: Map logical sound names to audio files in sounds/ subdirectory. Omit to disable sounds.

miniMode._comment: Set supported:false (or remove this block entirely) to disable mini mode for your theme.

objectScale._comment: Fine-tune the rendered size relative to viewBox. Defaults work for most themes.
